title: Surface incoming LICHEN messages and status to MeshCore app clients
description: Why this exists: a connected MeshCore client must see incoming LICHEN messages/status events if the adapter claims messaging support. What needs to be done: add or reuse an adapter-facing event API for incoming LICHEN local messages/status updates, translate those events into MeshCore app-visible notifications/responses, queue them over the local transport, and handle disconnected clients. Acceptance criteria: tests inject LICHEN message/status events and verify encoded MeshCore client-visible output; queue limits/drop policy are deterministic; disconnected clients do not corrupt adapter state; behavior is documented for smoke tests.
